LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.description: The AK-112 is a robust, pre-war assault rifle chambered for 5.56mm rounds. Known for its reliability and ease of maintenance, it remains a popular choice among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.label: AK-112 Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.description: A compact, fully automatic carbine chambered for 5mm rounds. Designed for military use, it offers a high rate of fire and excellent handling, making it ideal for close-quarters combat and suppressive fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.label: Assault Carbine
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Assault_Rifle.descriptio: A rugged and powerful assault rifle of Chinese origin. It was widely used by Chinese forces during the Sino-American War, known for its high damage output and reliability in harsh conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Assault_Rifle.label: Chinese Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.description: The G11 is a revolutionary German assault rifle using caseless ammunition. Its high rate of fire and advanced design make it a rare but highly sought-after weapon in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.label: G11 Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.description: A lightweight, semi-automatic carbine chambered for 5.56mm rounds. Designed for precision and medium-range engagements, it was favored by NCR marksmen for its accuracy and reliability.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.label: Marksman Carbine
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Power_Armor_Assault_Rifle.descri: The Assault Rifle is a pre-war, fully automatic rifle chambered for 5.56mm rounds. Its distinctive drum magazine and robust construction make it a favorite for sustained fire in the wasteland, though it is heavy and unwieldy compared to more modern designs requiring the use of power armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Power_Armor_Assault_Rifle.label: Power Armor Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.description: The R-91 is a pre-war, fully automatic assault rifle chambered for 5.56mm rounds. It was the standard-issue rifle for the U.S. Armed Forces before the Great War, known for its reliability and versatility in combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.label: R-91 Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
